_note: Two peer namespaces + RoleBindings are lifted from session.objects by deploy_workshop (authored_session_extras). The learner deploys the same app into both and observes isolation. app-a is then scaled to 0 to prove actions don't leak.

steps.run: envsubst < app.yaml | oc apply -n "$(oc project -q)-app-a" -f - && oc -n "$(oc project -q)-app-a" patch deployment/hello --type=json -p '[{"op":"add","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/imagePullPolicy","value":"Always"}]' && oc -n "$(oc project -q)-app-a" rollout status deploy/hello --timeout=150s

envsubst < app.yaml | oc apply -n "$(oc project -q)-app-b" -f - && oc -n "$(oc project -q)-app-b" patch deployment/hello --type=json -p '[{"op":"add","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/imagePullPolicy","value":"Always"}]' && oc -n "$(oc project -q)-app-b" rollout status deploy/hello --timeout=150s
